/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/invoice_manager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/services/pdf_text_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/services/async_pdf_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/data/invoice_database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/ui/project_selection_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/ui/manual_entry_dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/invoice_manager.dir/ui/invoice_manager_window.cpp.o -o invoice_manager.app/Contents/MacOS/invoice_manager -F/opt/homebrew/lib   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pugixml/1.15/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pugixml/1.15/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent -lpugixml /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
